page: Microsoft Azure M96bds_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the MBDSMediumMemoryv3 family. It is powered by an Intel Xeon 8473C processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture. The server features 96 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 48 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled, operating at a clock speed of 4.0 GHz. It is equipped with 768.0 GB of RAM, providing a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. The processor includes a 105 MB L3 cache and supports advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 and Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX) for accelerated vector and matrix operations.

For local storage, the instance includes a 410 GB local disk and is premium storage capable, optimized for high block storage performance. In benchmark evaluations, the M96bds_v3 demonstrates top-tier memory performance, achieving top 10% rankings in both cached small-block and uncached large-block read-only memory bandwidth, as well as large-block write bandwidth. Multi-threaded performance is highly competitive, with top-tier results in Geekbench multi-core, Passmark CPU, and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression. Single-core performance is moderate to strong, placing in the middle 50% for stress-ng single-core tests but reaching the top 10% in Geekbench single-core metrics.

The hardware profile is highly suited for memory-intensive workloads, large-scale database operations, and data processing tasks. Passmark database operations and Redis SET benchmarks both rank in the top 10%, indicating high efficiency for in-memory databases and transactional systems. Additionally, the inclusion of AMX instructions supports strong performance in LLM inference prompt processing. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the server offers a dense allocation of high-speed memory and dedicated compute resources, making it a viable option for consolidating enterprise databases and running heavy analytical pipelines without requiring dedicated GPU hardware.
description: Microsoft Azure M96bds_v3 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server from the MBDSMediumMemoryv3 family, powered by a 4.0 GHz Intel Xeon 8473C processor. It features 96 dedicated vCPUs (48 physical cores), 768.0 GB of RAM, and a 410 GB local disk with premium storage capabilities. The processor supports Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX) and AVX-512. Benchmarks reveal top-tier memory bandwidth, multi-core CPU performance, and database operations, alongside strong performance in LLM prompt processing. Lacking a GPU, this server is qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-dense, non-graphical enterprise workloads. It is highly recommended for large-scale in-memory databases, transactional databases, software compilation, and data-intensive enterprise applications.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M96bds_v3 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server featuring 96 vCPUs, 768 GB RAM, and a 410 GB local disk. It delivers top-tier memory bandwidth and database performance for enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure M96bds_v3 is a memory-optimized server with 96 vCPUs, 768 GB RAM, and a 410 GB local disk, built for enterprise database workloads.
tagline: A high-frequency, memory-dense virtual server designed for demanding enterprise databases, heavy multi-threaded processing, and large-scale in-memory workloads.
bullet_points: 96 dedicated vCPUs and 768 GB RAM powered by a 4.0 GHz Intel Xeon processor.
Includes 410 GB of local storage with premium block storage capabilities.
Top-tier memory bandwidth and multi-threaded CPU benchmark performance.
Intel AMX and AVX-512 support for accelerated vector and matrix computations.
Optimized for large-scale databases, Redis deployments, and enterprise data pipelines.
